name: Pinkie Pie (Custom)
description:
Attention!

This bot doesn’t come with a pre-set theme. Its purpose is for you to add a memory entry and a first message that sets the context for the theme you want to roleplay.

In other words, you can choose the setting, theme, situation, relationship, etc.

The character’s only function is to act as the character itself.
creator: Cxstt
